title: Icepack
description: A modpack that aims to enhance Minecraft while adding 0 content, making it viable for vanilla servers.
body:
The version format of this pack is dependent on the MC version. For example, v1 is for 1.19.2, v2 is for 1.19.3, and v3 will be for either 1.19.4 or 1.20, and so on.

A Fabric modpack that adds plenty of visual enhancement and performance improvement mods to improve how Minecraft feels to play, while adding 0 content, making it viable for Vanilla servers.

This pack is also geared towards PvP servers, ensuring that you won't get banned for having some advantage.

Here's my mod config settings

(rename this folder as config and put it in your modpack instance) If you have any questions, or want a mod to be added or removed, hit me up on Discord at IceBlossom#2814 Links I need to put here for legal reasons (links back to CF pages for mods): ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Effective - https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective Illuminations - https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations
